data.name: Fill
data.value: Fill out the Check-in Form and accept the terms and conditions to get access to the panel.

data.name: gcText
data.value: Please provide the details of all people who will be staying at the facility.

data.name: Ready
data.value: Your Booking Panel is now available!

data.name: Step2
data.value: I accept the obligation to report any damages and comments at check-in.

data.name: Step3
data.value: I accept the prohibition of smoking tobacco products and electronic cigarettes inside the facility.

data.name: Step4
data.value: It is forbidden to organize events and accept third parties not included in the reservation.

data.name: Step11
data.value: The hotel day lasts from one hour

data.name: Step12
data.value: on arrival up to one hour

data.name: Terms
data.value: RENTAL REGULATIONS The Terms and Conditions and the Agreement define the terms and conditions of booking and renting apartments that are the subject of rent by Rentoom Apartamenty Sp. z o.o. (Landlord), Stanisława Szymańskiego 1B, 87-100 Toruń, NIP: 879-27-27-407, KRS: 0000871532 for the benefit of the Tenant. 1. Booking or renting accommodation is tantamount to reading and accepting the provisions of the Terms and Conditions and Agreements. 2. The competent court to settle disputes will be the Court in Toruń. 3. The Landlord reserves the right to refuse to accept a Guest who: does not have a valid document identity card (i.e. identity card or passport) or does not want to present a document, is under the influence of alcohol or other narcotics, during his previous stay he violated the provisions of the Regulations. 4. The Landlord reserves the right to immediately terminate the contract with the Guest who breaks the Rental Regulations, without the right to refund the reservation fee. The guest will be required to immediately leaving the premises. 5. The hotel day lasts from 3:00 p.m. to 11:00 a.m. the next day. 6. On the day of departure, the Tenant is obliged to hand over the apartment by 11:00 a.m., otherwise A fee will be added in the amount of the next started day + 50%. 7. Smoking in the apartments is strictly prohibited. For violating the ban on smoking inside the apartment The tenant is obliged to pay an additional fee of PLN 500 (five hundred). 8. It is forbidden to use electrical equipment that is not part of the apartment and is risk of fire. 9. The Tenant is obliged to provide any damage or malfunction of the apartment equipment inform the Landlord immediately. 10. Pets are allowed only with the landlord's permission. The fee for a pet is PLN 50 for the entire stay. 11. Quiet hours in the rented apartment are between 10:00 p.m. and 6:00 a.m. People If you are not registered in the apartment, you can only visit until 11:00 p.m. 12. Organizing social events in the apartment is completely prohibited. For organizing the event The Lessee will pay an additional fee of PLN 5,000 + additional losses to the Landlord incurred by the Landlord. All damages to the rented apartment and building are the responsibility of the person of the Tenant. The tenant is responsible for all damages resulting from the conduct of third parties staying in the with her in the apartment – invited to the apartment/building by this person. In the event of an intervention by the Police or the Municipal Guard, the Landlord will charge the Tenant an additional fee of PLN 500 (five hundred zlotys). 13. The number of people staying in the apartment must not exceed the number specified during the reservation. Statement irregularities in this regard results in the calculation of an additional fee of PLN 200 for each of the persons registered for each night of stay. 14. Guests are obliged to properly secure the apartment, i.e. to close all doors thoroughly entrance and windows before each leaving the apartment and for storage keys/codes/remote controls without the possibility of unauthorized access to them. 15. The landlord is not responsible for damaged or lost valuables left in the apartment. 16. In case of loss/destruction of the apartment key or garage remote control, a fee will be charged in PLN 200 for each piece. 17. Final cleaning is included in the price of the stay. However, the Guest is obliged to leave after washed dishes and used equipment. These activities are not the essence of the final cleaning. 18. Any additional cleaning at the Landlord's special request is paid according to the amount of the fee service center. Bed linen and towels are replaced. 19. Utility fees provided by the Landlord are included in the price of the stay. Rentoom Apartamenty Sp. z o.o. Ul. Szymańskiego 1B, 87-100 Toruń www.rentoom.pl | tel. +48 881 388 001 20. The Tenant is financially responsible for all damages/thefts incurred in the apartment during the stay. 21. Please inform us immediately if there is any misunderstanding or if you do not satisfied with our services. We will do our best to thoroughly investigate the problem and resolve it. 22. The landlord may charge a deposit of up to PLN 1,000 from guests for reservations, which can be returned up to five days work after check-out. 23. The landlord is entitled to claim compensation for the amount of the fees in each case additional. 24. The Lessee has the right to complain about the service. Complaints should be submitted by e-mail to: reklamacje@rentoom.pl or by registered letter to the mailing address. A response will be provided within 14 days of its delivery. Rental regulations in English are available at www.rentoom.pl

data.name: TimeLeft
data.value: There is a lot left to stay

data.name: InvalidName
data.value: Only letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes

data.name: TermsLoadError
data.value: Failed to load consents. Please try again.

data.name: OptionalConsentsHint
data.value: You can change your optional consents at any time on the "About Booking" page.
